title: No carved pumpkin blur
description: A simple but effective resource pack that removes the annoying blur effect when wearing a carved pumpkin
body:
**No Carved Pumpkin Blur**

This simple resource pack completely removes the blur effect, giving you a clear view while still keeping the pumpkin on your head.
Not only does this let you see better, but it's also perfect for hiding from the new locator bar in multiplayer or traveling safely in the End without having to fight enderman!
